project: Phase C2B postmortem sprint — VST3 critic 4 MAJOR + 3 HIGH defects 청산
_archive_v1: Previous v1 stories (US-001/002/003) all passed; archived in git history

stories.title: kIsBypass 7th param 추가
acceptanceCriteria: vst3/SpatialEngineController.hpp 에 kBypass=6 enum 항목 추가
vst3/SpatialEngineController.cpp 의 initialize() 에 7번째 RangeParameter 등록 (StepCount=1, flags |= ParameterInfo::kIsBypass)
kParamCount 6 → 7 변경 (controller + processor 양쪽)
기존 6 param IID/UID 무변경 (id 0..5 보존)
ctest test_vst3_param_layout 통과 (param_count==7 verify)
ctest test_vst3_param_roundtrip 통과 (기존 6 + 신규 1 round-trip)
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

stories.title: state binary v2 + v1 fallback (controller + processor 양쪽 split-read + restartComponent)
acceptanceCriteria: vst3/SpatialEngineProcessor.cpp getState 가 36-byte v2 stream (8-byte header [magic 'SPE1' u32][version u16=2][param_count u16=7] + 28-byte body=7 floats) 출력
vst3/SpatialEngineProcessor.cpp setState 가 8-byte header read 후 version branch: v=1 → 24-byte body read + norm_values_[6].store(0.f); v=2 → 28-byte body read
vst3/SpatialEngineController.cpp setComponentState 가 동일 split-read 패턴 (8-byte header → branch → 24/28-byte body)
controller setComponentState 끝에 if (comp_handler_) comp_handler_->restartComponent(Steinberg::Vst::kParamValuesChanged) 호출 (nullptr guard 필수)
kStateBytesV1=32 + kStateBytesV2=36 상수 분리 (controller + processor 모두)
ctest test_vst3_state_persist 통과 (rename 12 + 신규 13-19 = 19 assertions)
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

stories.title: bypass dry pass-through 구현 + setIoMode hijack 폐기
acceptanceCriteria: vst3/SpatialEngineProcessor.cpp:131 의 setIoMode → bypass 우회 로직 제거 (return kResultOk only, kAdvanced/kSimple 양쪽)
vst3/SpatialEngineProcessor.cpp:392-399 의 bypass branch 가 channel-wise input→output memcpy (for ch < min(numIn, numOut), null-buffer guards)
bypass active flag 가 norm_values_[6].load() > 0.5f 로 결정 (controller 동기화)
ctest test_vst3_bypass 통과 (assertion 6 강화 + 신규 8-12 = 12 assertions)
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

stories.title: 로컬 OFF baseline checkpoint (mandatory blocking gate)
acceptanceCriteria: S3 commit 직후 / S4 push 직전 cmake -B build_off_check -DSPATIAL_ENGINE_VST3=OFF -DSPATIAL_ENGINE_NO_JUCE=ON 빌드 통과
sha256sum build_off_check/core/libspe_core.a build_off_check/core/spatial_engine_core | sed 's|build_off_check/||g' 가 .ci/off_baseline.bytes.sha256 와 정확히 일치 (diff exit 0)
fail 시 transitive header include leak 진단 + 수정 후 재실행 (최대 2회)
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

stories.title: RT-safety guard 강화 (__libc_malloc strong-symbol + R10 LTO defence)
acceptanceCriteria: vst3/tests/rt_alloc_probe.hpp 신규 — extern "C" void* __libc_malloc(size_t); + __libc_calloc + __libc_free direct declaration. NO dlsym, NO call_once, NO warmup
strong-symbol overrides extern "C" void* malloc(size_t) / calloc / free 가 g_real_malloc/calloc/free 로 위임 + g_rt_guard_active 시 g_alloc_count++
vst3/tests/test_vst3_dispatch_rt_safety.cpp 의 operator new/new[] 에서 if (g_rt_guard_active) ++g_alloc_count 제거 (double-count 방지)
negative-control assertions 추가: probe_observes_malloc (calls std::malloc(64) → assert g_alloc_count==1), probe_observes_calloc (calls std::calloc(1,64) → assert g_alloc_count==1)
rt_alloc_probe.hpp doc comment: 'test TUs MUST NOT enable -flto' 명시
post-build sanity: nm build_full_check/vst3/tests/test_vst3_dispatch_rt_safety | grep -E '^[0-9a-f]+ T (malloc|free|calloc)$' | wc -l == 3 (R10 Layer 1)
ctest test_vst3_dispatch_rt_safety 1000-iter PASS 유지
vst3/tests/CMakeLists.txt 에 -flto 미사용 유지 (R10 Layer 3)
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

stories.title: LD_DEBUG=libs CI gate 추가 (.github/workflows/vst3.yml)
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/vst3.yml 의 vst3-build-and-host-fixture job 에 'LD_DEBUG sysdep runtime gate' step 추가
step 은 LD_DEBUG=libs ./build_vst3_on/vst3/tests/test_vst3_host_fixture 2>&1 | grep -cE 'X11|freetype|alsa|webkit' == 0 verify
fail 시 echo 'Runtime sysdep leakage detected' + exit 1
host fixture step 직후 위치
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

stories.title: state IO test 12 → 19 assertions
acceptanceCriteria: assertion 12 rename: 12_getState_32_bytes → 12_getState_36_bytes + literal pos==32 → pos==36
NEW 13 multi_block_roundtrip_fresh_instance_bit_equal: 두 fresh SpatialEngineProcessor 인스턴스가 동일 v2 setState 후 process(512) ×1 block 결과 0 ULP bit-equal
NEW 14 state_oversize_33byte_short_read_default: 33-byte stream 시 setState 가 default 유지 (no crash)
NEW 15 concurrent_setState_getState_1000_iter: 1000-iter 양쪽 thread concurrent setState/getState 무crash, 무UAF
NEW 16 state_v2_36byte_single_block_roundtrip: setState v2 → process 1 block → output non-degenerate
NEW 17 controller_setComponentState_v1_32byte_ok: controller 가 v1 state 복원, norm_values_[6]==0.0
NEW 18 controller_setComponentState_v2_36byte_ok: controller 가 v2 state 복원, norm_values_[6]==1.0 if bypass=on encoded
NEW 19 multicall_v2_then_v1_bypass_reset: setState(v2 bypass=1) → setState(v1) → getState verify norm_values_[6]==0.0 (v1 fallback reset)
ctest test_vst3_state_persist 19 assertion 모두 PASS
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

stories.title: bypass test 7 → 12 assertions
acceptanceCriteria: strengthen 6 setIoMode_clear_bypass_ok: 실 audio output non-zero verify (input copy 또는 engine output)
NEW 8 kIsBypass_param_toggle_round_trip: setParamNormalized(6, 1.0) → getParamNormalized(6)==1.0 → toggle 0.0
NEW 9 bypass_dry_passthrough_identity: bypass on, ramp signal input, output==input on min(numIn, numOut) channels
NEW 10 bypass_cardinality_1in_2out: mono input → stereo output bus, output[0]==input[0], output[1] (정의 명시)
NEW 11 bypass_state_integration: bypass on → getState → setState fresh instance → bypass restored
NEW 12 setIoMode_no_longer_affects_bypass: setIoMode(kAdvanced) → bypass param 0.0 유지 (hijack 제거 verify)
ctest test_vst3_bypass 12 assertion 모두 PASS
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

stories.title: host fixture mock IComponentHandler 확장
acceptanceCriteria: vst3/tests/test_vst3_host_fixture.cpp 에 class MockComponentHandler : public Steinberg::Vst::IComponentHandler 신규 (~30-50 LOC)
FUnknown stubs: ref count atomic (addRef/release) + queryInterface (IComponentHandler::iid + FUnknown::iid 양쪽 처리)
restartComponent_call_count 멤버 + restartComponent(int32 flags) override 가 ++count
stub beginEdit/performEdit/endEdit (no-op + counter)
controller->setComponentHandler(&mock) wiring 추가
신규 assertion host_fixture_restartComponent_called_once: v2 setState 후 mock.restartComponent_call_count == 1
ctest test_vst3_host_fixture 22+ assertions PASS (현재 21 + 1 신규)
stories.completion_evidence: GHA run #6 acb8c27 both jobs SUCCESS, ctest 53/53 PASS

로컬 ctest: cd build_full_check && ctest --output-on-failure -R 'vst3_' 7 tests 모두 PASS (60+ assertions 누계)
